title: RenderTree
description: Structured render tree IR produced by WASM plugins. Pure-data, frontend-agnostic, validated by the platform before caching or delivery.

version.description: Schema version. Renderers MUST reject versions they don't support.

nodes.description: Top-level content nodes. Order is significant. Block-level nodes only.

type.description: Node type identifier. Primitives are unqualified; extensions use x- prefix.

props.description: Type-specific properties. Values must be JSON primitives only.

children.description: Child nodes. Absent on leaf nodes, present on container nodes.

fallback.description: Required on x- extension nodes. Must contain only primitive nodes.
